title: notoseris triflora
intro: Notoseris triflora, also known as the three-flowered Notoseris, is a plant species in the daisy family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Notoseris triflora include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its use in treating fever and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Notoseris triflora typically involve its roots and leaves being dried and made into teas or infusions, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
